general.name: Jamf Connect Login - SO5
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>60839486-43CE-45C7-883B-E1F3022119B7</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>60839486-43CE-45C7-883B-E1F3022119B7</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Login - SO5</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C856FD64-8F27-4AFE-8A29-1654D4BC4BD5</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C856FD64-8F27-4AFE-8A29-1654D4BC4BD5</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.jamf.connect.login</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>AllowNetworkSelection</key><true/><key>AuthServer</key><string>so5.okta.com</string><key>BackgroundImage</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/so5_wallpaper.jpg</string><key>CreateJamfConnectPassword</key><true/><key>CreateNewUserHide</key><true/><key>DemobilizeUsers</key><true/><key>DenyLocal</key><false/><key>LocalFallback</key><true/><key>LoginLogo</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/so5logo.png</string><key>LoginWindowMessage</key><string>Enter Your 6 Digit Employee Number In The Username Field.</string><key>Migrate</key><false/><key>OIDCAccessClientID</key><string>0oa2p8ua0cH5YzRlT697</string><key>OIDCAdminClientID</key><string>0oa2p8t5umT3rJ9mF697</string><key>OIDCProvider</key><string>Okta</string><key>OIDCRedirectURI</key><string>https://127.0.0.1/jamfconnect</string><key>DenyLocalExcluded</key><array><string>hbcaccnt0</string><string>accnt0</string><string>Jamfsa</string></array><key>MigrateUsersHide</key><array><string>hbcaccnt0</string><string>accnt0</string><string>Jamfsa</string></array></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>

computer_group.name: SO5 ABM - SO5 Enrolled Photo Studio Image Edit PreStage
